
## example: model for use-after-free {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_use-after-free-simple-model.qmd >}}

## exercise: aliasing and model {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_use-after-free-model-exer.qmd >}}

## points-to analysis {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_points-to.qmd >}}

## complicating points-to analysis {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_points-to-complex.qmd >}}

### loops

*  real code has loops
*  seems like a problem if we have to go through all the paths?

## example: model for use-after-free, with loop {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_use-after-free-simple-model-loop.qmd >}}
